spec.query: SELECT mean("temp_input") FROM "sensors" WHERE "chip" !~ /nvme/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "chip", "feature" fill(linear)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("bytes_recv"), 1s) * 8 AS "Inbound" FROM "net" WHERE $timeFilter AND "interface" !~ /^(lo|veth|br-|docker|virbr|tun|tap)/ GROUP BY time($__interval), "interface" fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("bytes_sent"), 1s) * 8 AS "Outbound" FROM "net" WHERE $timeFilter AND "interface" !~ /^(lo|veth|br-|docker|virbr|tun|tap)/ GROUP BY time($__interval), "interface" fill(null)
SELECT mean("usage_user") AS "User", mean("usage_system") AS "System", mean("usage_iowait") AS "IOWait" FROM "cpu" WHERE "cpu" = 'cpu-total' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("used") AS "Used", mean("cached") AS "Cached", mean("buffered") AS "Buffered" FROM "mem" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("uptime") FROM "system" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("load1") AS "1m", mean("load5") AS "5m", mean("load15") AS "15m" FROM "system" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("used_percent") AS "Swap Used %" FROM "swap" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("temp_c") FROM "smart_data" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "device" fill(none)
SELECT mean("battery_charge_percent") AS "Charge %" FROM "upsd" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdc' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdd' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sde' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdf' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdg' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdh' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdi' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'sdj' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'nvme0n1' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Read", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Write" FROM "diskio" WHERE "name" = 'nvme1n1' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("status_flags") AS "Status Flags" FROM "upsd" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT mean("load_percent") * mean("nominal_power") / 100 AS "Est. Watts" FROM "upsd" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
SELECT mean("temp_input") FROM "sensors" WHERE "chip" =~ /nvme/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "chip" fill(linear)
SELECT mean("temp_c") FROM "gpu_data" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
SELECT mean("power_w") AS "Power" FROM "gpu_data" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
SELECT mean("util_pct") AS "GPU %", mean("fan_pct") AS "Fan %" FROM "gpu_data" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
SELECT mean("mem_used_mib") AS "Used", mean("mem_total_mib") AS "Total" FROM "gpu_data" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
SELECT mean("input_voltage") AS "Input V", mean("output_voltage") AS "Output V" FROM "upsd" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(linear)
SELECT last("used_percent") FROM "disk" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "path"
SELECT last("temp_c"), last("power_on_hours"), last("reallocated_sectors"), last("pending_sectors"), last("health_ok") FROM "smart_data" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "device"
